original_image_tags: A handwritten page on aged, off-white paper with pencil and ink. At the top is a hand-drawn sketch of a disc-shaped object. Below the sketch is a multi-paragraph handwritten account. The case number "62-83894-115" is written in red ink in the top left corner. Faint pencil annotations are visible in the margins.

A pencil sketch showing a side-view of a wide, flat, disc-shaped object. The object has a raised, domed central section with a visible, red-colored horizontal line or "tublar flame" running along its side. A dashed line from the left points to the edge of the disc, labeled "pits or rounding". The central red feature is labeled "Tublar pip of flame".

elements.description: A hand-drawn sketch depicting a saucer-shaped object with a dark central oval, a red horizontal line, and an outer rim. Handwritten labels point to the drawing, including 'Tublar pipe or flame', '20 ft. long', and '7 to 8 ft. thick'. A handwritten note '62-83894-115' is written in red ink near the top left of the sketch.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements (sketch of a disc-shaped object with a red line and labels), but Description A includes additional details ('pits or rounding' label) and omits details ('20 ft. long', '7 to 8 ft. thick' labels) present in B without direct contradiction.
